user_query: On childs first day, add cinnamon toast crunch for breakfast

fields.name: Cinnamon Toast Crunch
fields.short_description: A crunchy cinnamon-sugar breakfast cereal popular with kids — served with milk for a quick, familiar morning option.
fields.serving_suggestion: Pour one to one-and-a-half cups of Cinnamon Toast Crunch into a bowl and add cold milk (dairy or plant-based). Top with sliced banana for extra potassium and natural sweetness if desired.
fields.nutrition_note: Provides quick carbohydrates for morning energy and is generally low in protein and fiber; pairing with milk adds calcium and protein, and adding fruit increases fiber and vitamins. Best used as an occasional, convenient breakfast choice.

result.reasoning: Child Day 1 breakfast already contains Ricotta Toast; appending (position -1) adds a quick, kid-friendly cereal option to the same breakfast slot.
